captions: smooth R&B, silky vocals, lush harmonies, slow groove, romantic, warm keys, subtle bass, late night vibes
neo-soul, live instruments, warm Rhodes piano, organic drums, soulful singing, jazzy chords, mellow groove
modern R&B, trap-influenced beat, atmospheric synths, emotional male vocals, moody, reverb-heavy, confessional
classic slow jam, smooth bass, gentle percussion, tender vocals, intimate, candlelit atmosphere, string accents
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Moonlight on your skin, I can't look away
Every little thing you do makes me wanna stay
Pull me closer, whisper something real
Show me what it's like to let somebody feel

[Chorus]
Falling into you like I never did before
Every touch a little deeper, leave me wanting more
Don't let go, don't let go tonight
Keep me in this moment, everything feels right

[Verse 2]
Silk sheets and slow songs playing through the dark
Your voice the only melody that moves my heart
I could stay forever in this space we made
Where the world outside just slowly fades

[Chorus]
Falling into you like I never did before
Every touch a little deeper, leave me wanting more
Don't let go, don't let go tonight
Keep me in this moment, everything feels right

[Outro]
Don't let go
Stay right here with me
